overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a tranquil stone courtyard with a central fountain, surrounded by lush spring vegetation and historic walls. The scene features floating butterflies and falling petals, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics with natural diffused lighting from an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed stone courtyard with central water fountain

events.description: colorful butterflies begin appearing and floating around the fountain area
butterflies cluster near the left side purple flower beds before dispersing
butterflies drift toward the right side near the stone lantern

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint observing the peaceful courtyard and fountain while butterflies flutter through the scene

entered.detail: large circular fountain with multiple tiers and clear water in the center of the courtyard
tall historic stone walls enclosing the courtyard with crenellations on top
stone archway with wooden doors in the center of the far wall
tall leafy trees rising above the courtyard walls in the background
bushes with white blossoms lining the left side of the courtyard
lavender or purple flowering plants in the left foreground
ornate black metal and stone lantern or lamp post on the right side

segments.scene_description: A serene, static view of a historic stone courtyard centered on a circular fountain. The enclosed garden features cobblestone paving, lush spring vegetation including flowering shrubs and trees, and an arched gateway in the far wall. Colorful butterflies flutter through the air throughout the segment, adding gentle movement to the otherwise still scene. The overcast sky provides soft, diffused natural lighting over the entire courtyard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a serene, static perspective of a historic stone courtyard that remains suspended in a moment of tranquil spring beauty. It begins with a centered view of a circular fountain, where the soft, diffused light of an overcast sky casts a gentle glow over the cobblestone paving. As the gaze lingers, the scene is animated by colorful butterflies fluttering through the air, weaving between lush flowering shrubs and verdant trees. The composition then expands to encompass the surrounding enclosed garden, drawing the eye toward an arched gateway set into the far historic wall. Finally, the stillness of the architecture contrasts with the delicate, continuous movement of the insects and vegetation under the muted light.
